1870800.name: Mutant Karate Canary
1870800.description:
MKC blends 80s and 90s Saturday morning TV show characters with deck-building and turn-based 2d tactics in a classic 1vs1 fight game setting.
Play your cards, use your action points efficiently and position your fighter to overcome the odds and defeat your opponent.



Pick from a variety of cards and mix up your fighting style by Fusing cards into new awesome combos.

Features

  • Use your position to your advantage: Creating space between you and your opponent can be both an advantage and disadvantage, depending on fighting style and opponent.
  • Explore the city and unlock all its secrets: Find cards, coins and stories to follow.
  • Deliver pizza.
  • Capture criminals & fight evil villains.
  • Unlock new cards.
  • Upgrade your fighter.
  • Smash cars for cash.
  • BE A HERO: Free South Town from the organized crime ring running the streets.

Summary

South Town is in desperate need of a hero. Gangs dominate the streets at night, leaving no one feeling safe anymore. Answer the call and fight your way through minions to reach the top of the crime syndicates. Along the way, assist the citizens, win fighting tournaments, and uncover the true mastermind behind the organized crime ring that plagues the streets.
1870800.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
